zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fiennes於大約1424年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir Roger Fiennes42歲，母親Elizabeth Holand22歲。她於大約1435年與Nicholas Carew, Esq II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年1月29日之前在英國素瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fiennes于大约1424年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir Roger Fiennes42岁，母亲Elizabeth Holand22岁。她于大约1435年与Nicholas Carew, Esq II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年1月29日之前在英国素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fiennes was born about 1424, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir Roger Fiennes, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Holand, was 22. She married Nicholas Carew, Esq II about 1435. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 29 January 1466, in Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fiennes est née environ 1424, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Fiennes, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Holand, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Carew, Esq II environ 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 29 janvier 1466, à Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fiennes um 1424 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Fiennes 42 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Holand 22. Sie hat um 1435 Nicholas Carew, Esq II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 29. Januar 1466 in Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fiennes è nata il circa 1424 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Fiennes, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Holand, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Carew, Esq II circa 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 29 gennaio 1466, nel Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fiennesが約1424年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Fiennesは42歳，母Elizabeth Holandは22歳であった。約1435年にNicholas Carew, Esq IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年1月29日以前にイギリススリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fiennes(이)가 대략 1424년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Fiennes(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Holand(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 Nicholas Carew, Esq II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 1월 29일 이전 영국 수리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1424, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Fiennes, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Holand, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Carew, Esq II aproximadamente 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 29 de janeiro de 1466, em Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fiennes родилась около 1424 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Fiennes было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Holand, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Carew, Esq II около 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 29 январь 1466 г. в местности сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1424, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Fiennes, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Holand, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Nicholas Carew, Esq II aproximadamente 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 29 de enero de 1466, en Surrey, Inglaterra.
